message:
Optimize diagram_layout.rs: 6 algorithmic and allocation improvements

- BinaryHeap in assign_layers (O(V²) → O((V+E) log V))
- Merge-sort inversion count in count_crossings (O(E²) → O(E log E))
- Buffer reuse in barycenter_sort (eliminate per-call allocations)
- Lazy clone in minimize_crossings (defer allocation until improvement found)
- Buffer reuse in assign_coordinates (reuse neighbor/sort buffers across passes)
- Single-pass quality metrics (combine variance + asymmetry in one loop)

All optimizations verified via golden output determinism test (exact f64 positions).
Includes criterion benchmark suite for layout performance tracking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -108,6 +108,7 @@ help = [
 tracing = "0.1.41"
 tracing-subscriber = "0.3.20"
 criterion = { version = "0.8.2", features = ["html_reports"] }
+stats_alloc = "0.1.10"
 ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.1.1" }
 ftui-render = { path = "../ftui-render", version = "0.1.1" }
 ftui-layout = { path = "../ftui-layout", version = "0.1.1" }
@@ -137,6 +138,11 @@ name = "plasma_bench"
 harness = false
 required-features = ["visual-fx"]
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "diagram_layout_bench"
+harness = false
+required-features = ["diagram"]
+
 [[test]]
 name = "backdrop_composition_tests"
 required-features = ["visual-fx"]
